---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Mail-IQ
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: 'Devengoyal885'
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who will benefit from it?

*Example: "As a power user with 200+ emails/day, I need X because Y..."*

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed implementation or approach.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered alternative solutions? Why were they not sufficient?

## 📸 Mockups / Examples

Add any mockups, screenshots, or examples from other apps that inspired this idea.

## 📏 Scope

- [ ] This is a small change (< 1 day of work)
- [ ] This is a medium change (1-3 days)
- [ ] This is a large change (1+ week)
- [ ] This requires a breaking change

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues and this hasn't been requested before
- [ ] I'm willing to contribute to implement this feature
- [ ] This aligns with Mail-IQ's core vision of AI-powered email intelligence
